message:
bd-fqh6: Fix interactive test assertion for ANSI-styled output

The test_prompt_from_reader_validates_and_reprompts test was asserting
that "digits only\n" appeared literally in the output. However, when
print_error applies a bold red style, ANSI escape codes are inserted
between the text and the newline, breaking the literal match.

Updated the assertion to check for the presence of the error message
content without requiring a specific sequence with the newline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
